files.read.description: Read the contents of a file. Returns the full text or a line range.

path.description: Absolute or sandbox-relative path to the file.

offset.description: Line number to start reading from (1-based).

limit.description: Maximum number of lines to return.

returns.content: string — file contents (or requested line range)

safety: Path must resolve within sandbox_root. Reject traversal (../) that escapes.
Symlinks must resolve within sandbox_root.
Binary files should be rejected or truncated.

files.write.description: Create or overwrite a file with the given content.

path.description: Absolute or sandbox-relative path to the file.

create_dirs.description: Create parent directories if they do not exist. Default: false.

returns.path: string — resolved absolute path of written file

safety: Path must resolve within sandbox_root.
Overwriting an existing file requires that the caller has read it first.
Do not write to .claude/ internals except through sanctioned skill updates.
No deletions — this tool creates or overwrites only.

files.list.description: List files and directories matching a glob pattern within the sandbox.

returns.entries: array of string — matching paths relative to sandbox_root

safety: Pattern must not escape sandbox_root.
Results are capped at 1000 entries to prevent memory issues.

files.diff.description: Compute a unified diff between two files or between file content and a string.

path_a.description: Path to the first file (or 'current' file).

path_b.description: Path to the second file. Mutually exclusive with 'content_b'.

content_b.description: String to compare against path_a. Mutually exclusive with 'path_b'.

context_lines.description: Number of context lines around changes. Default: 3.

safety: Both paths must resolve within sandbox_root.
Read-only operation; does not modify any files.

shell.run.description: Execute a shell command in the sandbox. Captures stdout, stderr, and exit code.

cwd.description: Working directory (must be within sandbox_root). Default: sandbox_root.

safety: Working directory must resolve within sandbox_root.
Denylist — reject commands containing: rm -rf /, mkfs, dd if=, fdisk, shutdown, reboot, halt, poweroff, init 0, init 6, :(){ :|:& };:
Do not allow commands that modify files outside sandbox_root.
Do not install system packages (apt, dnf, yum) without explicit user approval.
All invocations are logged to audit_log.

system.service.status.description: Get structured status of a systemd service unit. Read-only.

returns.raw_excerpt: string — last ~10 lines of status output

safety: Read-only operation. Does not start, stop, or restart services.
Service name is sanitized to alphanumeric, dash, underscore, dot, @.
All invocations are logged to audit_log.

system.service.restart.description: Restart a systemd service unit and verify it came back active. Requires confirmation.

returns.success: boolean — true if service is active (running) after restart
returns.blocked: boolean|absent — true if blocked by confirmation policy
returns.reason: string|absent — explanation if blocked or failed
returns.main_pid: integer|null — new Main PID after restart
returns.verification: string — how the restart result was confirmed

safety: Requires NOVACORE_CONFIRM=ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE environment variable.
Service name is sanitized to alphanumeric, dash, underscore, dot, @.
Post-restart status check verifies the service came back up.
All invocations are logged to audit_log.

repo.git.status.description: Get structured Git status: branch, ahead/behind, staged, modified, untracked files. Read-only.

returns.staged: array — [{status, path}] files staged for commit
returns.modified: array — [{status, path}] modified but unstaged files
returns.clean: boolean — true if working tree has no changes

safety: Read-only operation. Does not modify the repository.
All invocations are logged to audit_log.

repo.git.diff.description: Get structured working tree diff: per-file additions, deletions, and excerpts. Read-only.

path.description: Optional file path to scope the diff. Omit for full working tree diff.

returns.files: array — [{path, additions, deletions, excerpt}] per changed file
returns.total_files: integer — number of files with diffs
returns.total_additions: integer — total added lines across all files
returns.total_deletions: integer — total deleted lines across all files

safety: Read-only operation. Does not modify the repository.
Path argument is sanitized — flags disguised as paths are rejected.
All invocations are logged to audit_log.

git.run.description: Run an allowlisted git subcommand within the sandbox repository.

subcommand.description: Git subcommand. Must be one of the allowlist.

args.description: Array of string arguments passed to the git subcommand.

safety: Repository root must be sandbox_root.
Allowlisted subcommands: status, diff, log, add, commit, branch, checkout, show.
Forbidden without explicit user approval: push --force, reset --hard, clean -fd/-fx, rebase, filter-branch.
Do not commit files matching: .env, credentials.*, *.pem, *.key.
All invocations are logged to audit_log.
